name: Calculadora de Cerca
seo_title: Calculadora de Cerca – Ripas, Mourões e Trilhos
seo_description: Calcule quantas ripas, mourões e trilhos você precisa para sua cerca. Insira o comprimento da cerca e as dimensões das ripas para obter as quantidades exatas de...
description: Calculadora de Cerca. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Identify what you want to calculate with the Fence Picket Calculator.
Enter the fence length in the input field.
Enter the picket width in the input field.
Enter the gap between pickets in the input field.
Fill in the remaining fields with your measurements.
Click Calculate to see your result instantly.
mistakes: Entering values in the wrong units — check that all measurements use the same unit system.
Forgetting to include a waste or safety margin — add 5-10% extra for real-world projects.
Using incorrect default values — verify the suggested defaults match your specific situation.
Rounding intermediate values too early — keep full precision until the final result.
formula_display: Pickets = ceil(fence_length Ã· (picket_width + gap)); Posts = ceil(fence_length Ã· post_spacing) + 1
